case_studies.title: Former Rail Yard Brownfield Redevelopment to Mixed-Use District
case_studies.summary: Assessment, remediation, and regulatory closure of a 14-acre rail yard to enable mixed-use residential and commercial redevelopment in Milwaukee, WI.
case_studies.content: Our team completed a comprehensive brownfield redevelopment project for a former rail yard adjacent to a residential neighborhood in Milwaukee, Wisconsin. The project included Phase I and Phase II Environmental Site Assessments, soil and groundwater remediation for petroleum and metal impacts, risk assessment, and coordination with the Wisconsin DNR Voluntary Party Liability Exemption (VPLE) program. Through targeted excavation, in-situ treatment, and engineered barriers, we enabled the client to achieve regulatory closure while meeting stringent vapor intrusion and stormwater management requirements. The $3.2M remediation package was integrated into the overall redevelopment budget for a new mixed-use district.

case_studies.title: Riverfront Brownfield Conversion to Public Park
case_studies.summary: Redevelopment of a former metal fabrication property into a riverfront public park with institutional controls and soil capping.
case_studies.content: A Midwestern city engaged us to transform a 6-acre former metal fabrication facility into a community riverfront park. Historical fill and shallow groundwater contained elevated metals and PAHs. We conducted Phase II investigations, risk-based corrective action, and designed a soil capping and clean soil import program compatible with future landscaping. Working with the state brownfield program, we implemented deed restrictions, long-term monitoring, and a construction health and safety plan. The $1.85M remediation and cap construction were completed in 14 months, allowing the park to open on schedule.

case_studies.title: Chlorinated Solvent Plume Remediation at Industrial Warehouse
case_studies.summary: Design and implementation of in-situ remediation for a TCE plume impacting indoor air at an occupied warehouse.
case_studies.content: At an occupied distribution warehouse in New Jersey, historical degreasing operations resulted in a TCE groundwater plume and vapor intrusion concerns. We designed and implemented an in-situ chemical reduction (ISCR) program combined with sub-slab depressurization systems. Multiple injection events, real-time field monitoring, and performance optimization reduced concentrations by over 95% within three years. The project required coordination with state regulators, tenants, and the property owner to maintain operations during remediation.

case_studies.title: Stormwater Compliance Upgrade for Automotive Parts Plant
case_studies.summary: Comprehensive stormwater system redesign and NPDES compliance support for a 40-acre automotive parts facility.
case_studies.content: A Tier 1 automotive supplier in Georgia struggled with recurring benchmark exceedances at its stormwater outfalls. We performed a full drainage assessment, sampling program, and BMP evaluation, followed by design of upgraded treatment units, covered storage, and good housekeeping improvements. We also provided NPDES permit renewal support, SWPPP updates, and staff training. Within 18 months, benchmark exceedances were eliminated and inspection findings were reduced significantly.

case_studies.title: Pipeline Release Response and Groundwater Recovery
case_studies.summary: Emergency response, free-product recovery, and long-term groundwater remediation following a crude oil pipeline release.
case_studies.content: Following a 5,000-barrel crude oil release from a transmission pipeline in West Texas, our emergency response team mobilized within hours to contain the spill, recover free product, and protect nearby surface water. We designed and executed a multi-phase remediation program including vacuum-enhanced recovery, soil excavation, and monitored natural attenuation. The project included extensive stakeholder and regulatory coordination, including wildlife agencies and landowners.

case_studies.title: Closed Landfill Cap Upgrade and Methane Control
case_studies.summary: Upgrades to a 40-year-old municipal landfill cap and gas collection system to address settlement and methane migration.
case_studies.content: A western U.S. municipality retained us to evaluate and upgrade the cover and gas collection systems at a 70-acre closed landfill. We performed a detailed cap condition assessment, designed repair and reinforcement measures, and modernized the passive gas venting network. Methane migration monitoring wells were installed and incorporated into a long-term monitoring plan, reducing off-site methane detections below regulatory thresholds.

case_studies.title: Portfolio Phase I ESAs for Regional Shopping Centers
case_studies.summary: ASTM-compliant Phase I ESAs for a portfolio of 12 shopping centers across four Midwestern states.
case_studies.content: We supported a real estate investment trust (REIT) by delivering expedited Phase I Environmental Site Assessments for 12 shopping centers within a 45-day due diligence window. Our team coordinated site reconnaissance, regulatory file reviews, and interviews across multiple states while maintaining consistent reporting formats and risk ratings. Recommendations for additional investigation were integrated into transaction negotiations.

case_studies.title: Mine Closure Planning and Water Management
case_studies.summary: Integrated environmental and social closure planning for a remote open-pit mine.
case_studies.content: For an international mining client, we led the environmental and water management components of a multi-disciplinary closure plan. The project included pit lake modeling, geochemical source term evaluations, engineered covers for waste rock and tailings, and long-term water treatment options. Stakeholder engagement and social impact mitigation strategies were developed in parallel with technical designs.

case_studies.title: Brownfield Redevelopment to Mixed-Income Housing
case_studies.summary: Remediation and regulatory closure of a former manufacturing site for conversion to mixed-income residential housing.
case_studies.content: A community development corporation in Massachusetts partnered with us to redevelop a former foundry into 120 units of mixed-income housing. We completed Phase I/II ESAs, hot spot removal of lead-impacted soils, and implementation of a vapor mitigation system under the new building slab. The project leveraged state brownfield tax credits and federal housing funds.

case_studies.title: Multi-Site RCRA Compliance Audit for Chemical Manufacturer
case_studies.summary: RCRA compliance audits and corrective action planning for five chemical manufacturing plants.
case_studies.content: We executed a standardized RCRA compliance audit protocol across five Midwestern chemical manufacturing facilities. Findings were prioritized based on risk, with corrective action plans, SOP updates, and staff training rolled out over 12 months. The client significantly reduced violations, notices of non-compliance, and waste handling costs.

case_studies.title: SPCC Plan Updates for Gulf Coast Fuel Terminals
case_studies.summary: SPCC and FRP updates for three marine fuel terminals along the Gulf Coast.
case_studies.content: An energy company engaged us to update SPCC and Facility Response Plans for three fuel terminals in the Gulf Coast region. The project included secondary containment capacity verification, overfill protection evaluations, boom deployment planning, and integration with the client's corporate emergency response program.

case_studies.title: Phase I ESAs for West Coast Office Portfolio Acquisition
case_studies.summary: Coordinated Phase I ESAs for 9 office properties across California and Washington under an accelerated due diligence schedule.
case_studies.content: A private equity firm acquiring a nine-building office portfolio on the West Coast needed rapid environmental due diligence. We mobilized teams in California and Washington to perform concurrent Phase I ESAs, focusing on vapor intrusion, tenant operations, and nearby dry cleaner risks. Our findings informed purchase price adjustments and environmental escrow provisions.

case_studies.title: National Small System Drinking Water Compliance Support
case_studies.summary: Ongoing compliance assistance for small community and non-transient non-community water systems.
case_studies.content: We provided technical assistance, training, and sampling program design for over 200 small drinking water systems across the United States. Services included regulatory updates, contaminant monitoring plans, and troubleshooting of treatment system issues.

case_studies.title: Clean Air Act Permitting for Specialty Coatings Facility
case_studies.summary: Title V permit renewal, emissions inventory, and control technology evaluation for a specialty coatings manufacturer.
case_studies.content: A specialty coatings facility in North Carolina required assistance with Title V permit renewal and a complex emissions inventory. We evaluated control options for VOC and HAP reductions, supported stack testing, and prepared permit modification applications in coordination with state regulators.

case_studies.title: PFAS Investigation at Municipal Airport
case_studies.summary: Site characterization and interim remedial measures for PFAS-impacted soil and groundwater from historical AFFF use.
case_studies.content: A regional airport authority engaged us to investigate per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances (PFAS) impacts related to historical use of aqueous film-forming foam (AFFF) for firefighting training. We designed a phased investigation including soil, groundwater, surface water, and sediment sampling, followed by interim source control measures and recommendations for long-term management.

tools.name: Cleanup Cost Estimator
tools.description: Interactive tool for estimating cleanup costs based on site size, contaminant type, and selected treatment and disposal options.

remediation_packages.name: Integrated Soil & Groundwater Remediation – Tier 1
remediation_packages.shortDescription: Entry-level integrated soil and groundwater remediation package with regulatory reporting.
remediation_packages.detailedDescription: Designed for smaller sites with moderate contamination, this Tier 1 package includes soil excavation or in-situ treatment for hot spots, limited groundwater extraction or in-situ injections, and preparation/submittal of a concise regulatory closure or progress report. Ideal for commercial properties and light industrial sites where both soil and shallow groundwater are impacted.

remediation_packages.name: Integrated Soil & Groundwater Remediation – Tier 2
remediation_packages.shortDescription: Comprehensive soil and groundwater remediation with expanded monitoring and full regulator coordination.
remediation_packages.detailedDescription: This package is suited for sites with multi-source soil impacts and a defined groundwater plume. It includes remedial design, soil excavation and off-site disposal or in-situ stabilization, multi-well groundwater extraction or injection, and preparation of detailed work plans, interim status updates, and a final remedial action report to regulatory agencies.

remediation_packages.name: Integrated Soil & Groundwater Remediation – Tier 3
remediation_packages.shortDescription: Enhanced multi-phase soil and groundwater remediation for larger or more complex sites.
remediation_packages.detailedDescription: For complex industrial or brownfield sites, this Tier 3 package includes multiple phases of in-situ soil and groundwater treatment, optimization events, and an expanded monitoring network. Regulatory support covers remedial action plans, response to agency comments, and a comprehensive completion report suitable for property transactions or brownfield incentives.

remediation_packages.name: Complex Site Integrated Soil & Groundwater Program
remediation_packages.shortDescription: Full-scale remediation program for complex or multi-contaminant soil and groundwater plumes.
remediation_packages.detailedDescription: Intended for refineries, terminals, and legacy manufacturing facilities, this package bundles remedial investigation, pilot testing, full-scale soil and groundwater remedy implementation, and long-term performance monitoring. Regulatory reporting includes work plans, semiannual/annual status reports, and a final remedial action completion report.

remediation_packages.name: Soil Excavation & Off-Site Disposal – Standard Package
remediation_packages.shortDescription: Turnkey soil excavation, profiling, transportation, and disposal with a brief closure summary.
remediation_packages.detailedDescription: This package focuses on impacted soil only. It includes development of a health and safety plan, excavation of up to 1,500 cubic yards, confirmation sampling, waste profiling, transportation and disposal, and preparation of a concise closure summary or letter report to submit to regulators or lenders.

remediation_packages.name: Groundwater Pump & Treat Startup Package
remediation_packages.shortDescription: Startup and optimization of a small groundwater pump-and-treat system with initial reporting.
remediation_packages.detailedDescription: Includes design verification, system startup, the first three months of operation and maintenance, and preparation of an initial performance and compliance report. Designed for sites with existing extraction wells or where limited new infrastructure is needed.

remediation_packages.name: In-Situ Chemical Oxidation Pilot – Groundwater
remediation_packages.shortDescription: Pilot-scale in-situ chemical oxidation (ISCO) treatment of a groundwater hot spot.
remediation_packages.detailedDescription: This pilot package covers design and implementation of a single ISCO injection event at up to four wells, with baseline and post-injection groundwater sampling. Results can be used to support full-scale remedy selection. Regulatory reporting is limited to data summaries; formal closure reporting is not included.

remediation_packages.name: Vapor Intrusion Mitigation – Existing Building
remediation_packages.shortDescription: Design and installation of sub-slab depressurization or venting for an existing structure.
remediation_packages.detailedDescription: Includes a pre-design vapor assessment, system design, installation oversight for a small to mid-size commercial or industrial building, and a short commissioning summary. Regulatory reporting is limited to design and startup documentation; full closure reporting is not included by default.

remediation_packages.name: UST Removal & Limited Soil Cleanup
remediation_packages.shortDescription: Removal of one underground storage tank (UST) with limited soil excavation and documentation.
remediation_packages.detailedDescription: Package includes tank tightness verification, removal of one UST up to 10,000 gallons, excavation and stockpiling of impacted soil, field screening, and preparation of a basic closure report for submittal to the appropriate storage tank program. Groundwater investigation or remediation is not included.

remediation_packages.name: Monitored Natural Attenuation Management Plan
remediation_packages.shortDescription: Long-term monitored natural attenuation (MNA) strategy and reporting for groundwater plumes.
remediation_packages.detailedDescription: Supports sites where monitored natural attenuation has been accepted by regulators. Includes development of an MNA monitoring plan, one year of sampling events at existing wells, data evaluation, trend analysis, and preparation of an annual MNA status report ready for regulatory submittal.

training_courses.title: Construction Stormwater Compliance for Site Supervisors
training_courses.description: Covers permit requirements, SWPPP implementation, inspection best practices, and common violations for active construction sites.

training_courses.title: Jobsite Hazardous Materials Handling for Construction Managers

training_courses.title: OSHA & Environmental Compliance for Construction Project Leads
training_courses.description: Integrated overview of OSHA safety, stormwater, waste, and spill requirements tailored for construction project leaders.

training_courses.title: Practical SPCC & Spill Response on Construction Sites
training_courses.description: Focuses on fuel storage, refueling operations, secondary containment, and field-level spill response for construction crews.

training_courses.title: Environmental Compliance Essentials for EHS Managers
training_courses.description: Comprehensive overview of core environmental programs including RCRA, CAA, CWA, and EPCRA with practical implementation tips.

training_courses.title: RCRA Hazardous Waste Management for Generators
training_courses.description: In-depth coverage of generator categories, accumulation standards, labeling, inspections, and common enforcement issues.

training_courses.title: Wastewater Treatment Plant Operator Certification Prep
training_courses.description: Prepares plant operators for state wastewater certification exams with a focus on process control, calculations, and troubleshooting.

training_courses.title: Air Permitting & ESG Considerations for Executives
training_courses.description: High-level briefing on Clean Air Act permitting strategy, risk, and ESG implications for senior leadership.

training_courses.title: Environmental Awareness for General Staff
training_courses.description: Introductory course on good environmental practices, spill prevention, and waste minimization for all employees.

training_courses.title: Regulatory Updates & Inspection Trends for State Inspectors
training_courses.description: Covers emerging federal and state regulatory trends, inspection focus areas, and best practices for consistent enforcement.

training_courses.title: Advanced PFAS Investigation & Sampling Techniques
training_courses.description: Technical deep dive into PFAS conceptual site models, low-level sampling methods, and data usability for complex sites.

training_courses.title: Brownfield Redevelopment Strategy for Public Agencies
training_courses.description: Helps municipal and redevelopment agency staff structure brownfield projects, funding, and liability protections.
